THE CAUSE IS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED BY BOTH SIDES. DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION TO SEAL IS TENTATIVELY GRANTED, NO OBJECTION BY PLAINTIFF. EXHIBIT C TO THE DECLARATION OF THOMAS LININGER FILED NOV-09-2020, CONTAINING MOVING PARTY'S MEDICAL RECORDS IS ORDERED SEALED, SUBJECT TO WRITTEN ORDER AND FINAL RULING. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A REDACTED VERSION FOR FILING. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO SEAL. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS DENIED FOR THE REASONS AND SUBJECT TO THE CONDITIONS SET FORTH IN THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS THE COURT'S RULING, ATTACHES THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION, AND COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-21-2021 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2020 Continued To Jun-14-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant Mona Belleci'S Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Defendant Mona Belleci'S Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Defendant's motion for a protective order is denied for the reasons and subject to the conditions set forth in the report and recommendation.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats the court's ruling, attaches the report and recommendation, and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of And Defendants Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-12-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances by ZOOM Video-conferencing:
Attorney, Thomas D. Lininger of the law offices of Thomas D Lininger (Tel: 916.962.0253; Email: tom@tdllaw.com) appears as counsel for opposing party, Francisca Marina Angel Garcia

Attorney, Treva R. Stewrat of the law offices of Carbone, Smith & Koyama of the law offices of (Tel: 510) 267-7272; Email: Treva.Stewart@csaa.com) appears as counsel for moving party, Mona Bellecci

No other appearance is made in this matter

Defendant does not stipulate to judge pro tem.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. Defendant's oral motion to seal is tentatively GRANTED, no objection by plaintiff. Exhibit C to the Declaration of Thomas Lininger filed Nov-09-2020, containing moving party's medical records is ordered sealed, subject to written order and final ruling. Counsel for plaintiff is directed to submit a redacted version for filing. Counsel for defendant/moving party is directed to submit a proposed order to seal.

DEFENDANT MONA BELLECI's Motion For Protective Order And Request For Sanctions is CONTINUED to November 24, 2020 at 9:30 AM in Law and Motion Deparmtent 302.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane: Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (Disc302)
